title: Diagnostic and detection techniques – Application Agrorobotica SpyFly
subtitle: Techniques de diagnostic et de détection - Application Agrorobotica SpyFly
description: A guide to the application of Agrorobotica SpyFly, an AI-powered system for real-time pest monitoring in vegetable crops using color- and pheromone-baited sticky traps, imaging, and cloud-based analysis. It supports SMART Integrated Pest Management by reducing crop losses, field labor, and chemical treatments while facilitating organic production.
